response.step_by_step_log: I scanned the video and identified the song title '魔法戦隊マゼンレンジャー' from the on-screen text in the corners. I performed web searches using the song title and 'Hololive' to find official lyrics in both Japanese and English. No official lyric databases or reliable translation pages contained this specific track, suggesting it is likely a special event-exclusive song. Therefore, the lyrics fields are set to null.
response.global_summary: The video shows a 3D concert performance featuring Hololive VTubers performing a song titled "魔法戦隊マゼンレンジャー" (Mahou Sentai Majenrenja), followed by a brief dialogue segment.

scenes.description: Hololive VTubers perform the song '魔法戦隊マゼンレンジャー' on a 3D stage with a crowd. Song title and credits are visible in the top-right and bottom-left corners throughout the performance.
scenes.song_title: 魔法戦隊マゼンレンジャー
scenes.performer_in_video: Yukihana Lamy, Shishiro Botan, Houshou Marine, Shirakami Fubuki, Himemori Luna, Sakura Miko
